Not all blessings arrive in recognizable forms.
A dragon’s gaze may linger too long upon your path.
Fortune and misfortune often wear the same mask.
A red lantern flickers despite the absence of wind.
Something ancient watches quietly during the celebrations.
You may feel destiny tightening around you tonight.
The stars whisper warnings alongside their blessings.
A gift may arrive carrying more than good intentions.
The night sky feels impossibly deep during this new year.
The universe whispers: 'Every blessing demands its balance.'
